title: 有馬記念（シニア）にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen, and the crowd is
excited to see Special Week and Grass Wonder
face off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, opportunity comes when no one is
looking. With ideas flowing, Seiun Sky the
tactician is back and ready to make this race
something no one expects.
